market_pulse: Competitors ramping weekend talent (Zedd, Lil Tunchichi, De'orro, Tiësto coverage), while LIV executes premium lineup (David Guetta Saturday, Matroda later week) — heavy influencer focus on discovery/review content.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: David Guetta performing TODAY (4/18) — high-profile talent draw
LIV Beach actively promoting (38K followers, recent posts with DJ names)
Competitor coverage intense across social platforms
Influencer discovery + review videos trending (globeth0tter, promoters active)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Peak weekend execution. Capitalize on Guetta's star power with real-time social amplification. Monitor story activity closely. Expect high capacity/sellout conditions. Deploy VIP/bottle service team to maximize conversion.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan) showing higher BTS/behind-the-scenes content with talent spotlights and countdown content. LIV social showing event-focused only.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post 2-3 daily stories during Guetta night: DJ prep/soundcheck, guest arrivals, live floor moments. Use countdown format 4h before doors.

content_gaps.description: Competitor venues (XS, OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan) tagging micro-influencers and promoter partnerships heavily. LIV showing organic guest reviews but limited partnership visibility.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Outreach to discovery creators (globeth0tter style reviewers, Vegas lifestyle accounts). Offer early access to Guetta night in exchange for real-time review content.

content_gaps.description: UGC hashtag strategy (#livlasvegas, #livbeach) showing organic use by partygoers but lower repost volume vs competitors using official hashtags with consistent branding.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create weekend-specific hashtag campaign: #LIVGuettaSaturday. Incentivize UGC tagging with story features and contest mechanics (best video wins bottle service).

influencer_activity.mention: Posted 'Honest Review of LIV Nightclub as a gal on guest list' — 591 likes, 61 comments. Active discovery content creator with Vegas focus.
Edwin | LIV Las Vegas Promoter posting recurring guest list + ticket promo content. High activity, high reach to prospective partygoers.
Norman Jay XS/Encore promoter. 176K followers, active daily. Competitor-aligned but shows promotion methodology for Las Vegas nightlife.
Edson Vegas Club Promoter. Actively covering Tao Beach, Hakkasan, OMNIA. Multi-venue strategy suggests distributed content reach.

liv_outreach_targets.suggested_approach: Invite to Guetta Saturday with VIP upgrade. Request real-time review/story content.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Internal promoter already running LIV channel — leverage for weekend amplification
